name: product-planning 标准化模板
defaultScope: 不包含成本试算和销售计划；如用户明确要求并提供成本/销量假设，才单独追加。
evidenceRule: 所有结论必须由 SellerSprite MCP、Amazon 前端、已有源报告或用户提供假设支撑；MCP 没有返回的数据必须写 N/A 或数据缺口，不允许凭空补数。
excelOutputRule: 后续生成 Excel 时必须保留 Markdown 报告，并将 MCP 原始/聚合数据输出到工作簿的 MCP原始数据 与 数据来源 Sheet。
validationRule: 报告完成后按可用密钥执行 Gemini + GLM 脱敏交叉验证；验证输入只发送脱敏摘要，不发送 API key、token、本地路径或 raw 文件名。
marketCategoryRule: Derive candidate paths from all validated competitor nodeIdPath values. Prefer the deepest repeated and functionally relevant leaf node. Use a majority common parent only when it is not overbroad; otherwise retain the relevant leaf and record adjacent categories plus the rejection reason.

competitorSheet.userInput: The command provides exactly three semicolon-separated seed ASINs. Do not ask for the same ASINs again; optional context is collected in chat only.
competitorSheet.validation: Each user ASIN must pass asin_detail existence, marketplace, title relevance, and node relevance checks. Reject duplicates and invalid ASINs.
competitorSheet.systemSupplement: Use competitor_lookup/product_research plus asin_detail to add one necessary sample that fills a missing head-review, low-price, or premium-differentiation dimension. Use N/A with a data gap if no candidate passes.
competitorSheet.layout: Three-seed comparison table, differentiation-signal comparison table, and four vertical competitor cards. The fourth card is the validated system supplement or N/A.
competitorSheet.imageRule: Use the first seed ASIN's verified Amazon frontend main image for the 意向产品 reference-image field. Record it as a frontend snapshot in 数据来源; keep N/A when the page or image cannot be verified.
competitorSheet.evidence: Features require frontend or asin_detail.features plus 4-5 star review evidence; pain points require 1-3 star review evidence.
competitorSheet.conclusion: At most three evidence-backed actions covering sample validation, listing expression, and pricing or advertising.

intentSheetStyle.verifiedFunctions: 功能一至功能四，灰底红字
intentSheetStyle.unmetNeeds: 功能五至功能七，亮黄底红字并标注未满足需求
intentSheetStyle.image: 模板不内置产品图；运行时仅插入第一款种子 ASIN 的已验证 Amazon 前端主图
